ingredients.item: 1 kg of thigh cut into bites
1 kg of thigh cut into bites

Place them in a small fireproof vehicle or in a small baking pan.

Mezcla y cocina por 10 minutos.
Serve and decorate with acid cream and minced nuts.

lemon-drop-shots.name: Lemon Drop Shots
instructions: Combine vodka and lemon juice in a shot glass.
Sprinkle 1/2 teaspoon sugar on top.
Place remaining 2 teaspoons sugar on a small plate; dip lemon wedges in sugar.
Suck on a sugared lemon after drinking the shot.

lemon-verbena-syrup.name: Lemon Verbena Syrup

ingredients.item: To 30 large fresh lemon verbena leaves

instructions: In a medium saucepan set over medium heat, bring the water and sugar to a boil.
Add the lemon verbena leaves and cover the pan. Steep for 15 minutes.
Strain the syrup through a fine-mesh strainer, discard the leaves, and let cool.
Store the syrup in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 4 days.

lemon-berry-muffins.name: Lemon-berry Muffins
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (180°C) and line a 6-cup jumbo muffin tin with liners.

In a large bowl, cream the butter and sugar with an electric hand mixer on medium speed until very fluffy, about 4 minutes. Add the lemon extract and continue beating for another minute. Add the eggs, 1 at a time, beating on medium speed for 30 seconds after each addition. Add the buttermilk and carefully beat to combine. The mixture will look a little grainy, but will come together once the dry ingredients are added.
In a medium bowl, whisk together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
Sift the dry ingredients into the wet ingredients and beat on medium-low speed to incorporate. Do not overmix.
Add the blueberries and carefully fold into the batter using a rubber spatula.
Divide the batter evenly between the prepared muffin cups, filling halfway, and sprinkle with more sugar.
Bake the muffins for 25-30 minutes, rotating halfway, or until light golden brown. Let the muffins cool for 5 minutes in the pan, then transfer to a wire rack to cool completely.
Enjoy!

lemon-pistachio-loaf.name: Lemon-pistachio Loaf
instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 325°. Grease a 9x5" loaf pan with vegetable oil, then line with parchment paper, leaving overhang on long sides. Oil parchment paper (for insurance and an easy release).
Pulse pistachios in a food processor until finely ground (it’s okay if some of the pieces are a bit larger). Set aside a heaping tablespoonful.

Whisk lemon zest, flour, granulated sugar, baking powder, salt, and remaining pistachios in a large bowl. Whisk olive oil, 2 Tbsp. lemon juice, remaining ⅓ cup vegetable oil, and ½ cup water in a small bowl to combine. Pour oil mixture into dry ingredients and fold with a rubber spatula to combine. Be very careful not to overmix: This batter contains a high ratio of liquid, which means it can get gummy if overworked. Transfer to prepared pan and use a spatula to distribute batter; batter should come halfway up the sides.

Bake cake until golden brown all over, it springs back when gently pressed, and a tester inserted into the center comes out clean, 50–60 minutes. It's okay if your cake has dipped a little in the center. Transfer pan to a wire rack and let cake cool completely in pan, at least 2 hours. Using parchment overhang, lift cake out of pan and place on rack. Peel away parchment.

Whisk powdered sugar and 3 Tbsp. lemon juice in a medium bowl, drizzling in remaining 2 Tbsp. lemon juice as needed until you have a thick but pourable glaze. Pour glaze over cake, letting it drip down the sides (if your cake has dipped, you can always glaze the flat underside instead of the top). Immediately top cake with reserved pistachios, then let sit until glaze is set, at least 30 minutes.
Do Ahead: Cake can be made 3 days ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.

lemon-roasted-salmon-with-escarole-aspar.name: Lemon-roasted Salmon With Escarole, Asparagus, And Potatoes

ingredients.item: Roasted bell peppers from a jar

instructions: Preheat oven to 149°C. Place salmon in a baking dish and rub with lemon zest, oregano, salt, and pepper on all sides, then coat with oil. Arrange peppers around salmon. Bake until salmon is firm but still pink in the center, about 20 minutes (if you prefer salmon more well done, cook an additional 5 minutes).

Set a steamer basket in a large pot filled with 2" water. Cover pot and bring water to a boil. Add potatoes, cover, and steam until tender, 10–12 minutes. Add asparagus to potatoes, cover, and steam until crisp-tender, 3–5 minutes.
Meanwhile, whisk oil, lemon juice, honey, salt, pepper, and 1/4 cup dill in a small bowl or measuring cup. Toss escarole with half of the dressing in a large bowl, then transfer to a serving platter.
Toss potatoes and asparagus with remaining dressing in same bowl, then arrange over escarole. Flake salmon into large pieces and arrange on platter. Top with feta, peppers, and dill sprigs.

lemony-smoked-trout-dip.name: Lemony Smoked Trout Dip
instructions: Using a fork, mix trout, labneh, crème fraîche, lemon juice, 3 Tbsp. chives, and 1 Tbsp. dill in a medium bowl until trout flakes into very small pieces. Season with salt, pepper, and more lemon juice, if desired.
Just before serving, drizzle dip with oil and top with more chives, dill, and pepper.
Do Ahead: Dip can be made 2 days ahead. Cover and chill.

lentils-and-chickpeas-with-greens.name: Lentils And Chickpeas With Greens

ingredients.prep: such as spinach, kale, or Swiss chard, bottom stems trimmed

instructions: Cook lentils in a medium pot of salted water until tender, 10–15 minutes; drain and let cool. Heat 1 Tbsp. oil in a medium skillet over medium-high heat. Add greens and cook, stirring occasionally, until wilted and bright green, about 3 minutes. Season with salt and pepper. Combine lentils, chickpeas, and remaining 2 Tbsp. olive oil in a medium bowl; season with salt and pepper. Divide among 2 bowls and top with greens, tomatoes, and Parmesan. Squeeze lemon over.

lentils-with-vegetables-recipe-comedera.name: Lentils With Vegetables Recipe
instructions: To start with, we're going to do some good lentils. The best practice is to place them in a paddle (by parts, if a paddle) to check that pounding or other elements have been found between the grains. It will also be easier to pass them under a jet of water and rinse them to make sure that there is no ground between the grains.
De momento, reservaremos las lentejas y prepararemos las otras verduras para utilizarlas en la receta. Comenzaremos por pelar las zanahorias y cortarlas en ruedas.

Then we'll peel the potatoes and cut them into cubes. In the case of a leek, we will wash it well, remove the root and the green part and cut the target onto wheels. We will also preserve the green part and place it completely into the stock, so that it will be cooked and have a taste.
Finalmente, pelaremos el ajo y la cebolla, y picaremos ambos muy finamente.

Entonces buscaremos una olla grande, agregaremos las lentejas, todas las verduras que hemos picado (salvo el ajo y la cebolla), una hoja de laurel, un chorrito de aceite, y un toque de sal y pimienta al gusto.

Then we'll pour water to cover all the solids and get through them with three fingers. We'll mix up and light up with medium fire. We will have 20 minutes of cooking as soon as they reach the boiling. We'll let the potage get covered up.

While cooking the ingredients of the pot, we will make a socorro with garlic and onion. To this end, we will heat an oil jet into a frying pan and a hot light, we will cook both vegetables for five minutes, at medium-low heat, constantly stirring.
After this time, we will withdraw the production of the fire and add the sweet pimenton and tomato purée. We'll mix everything well to make some kind of salsa or lentil condiment.
When that condition's ready, we'll put it into the lentils with vegetables. We'll mix and let them finish cooking.

Once the cooking time of the lentils has been completed, we will have them tested to check that they are ready and have good time. If you feel they're not tender yet, you can let them cook for a few more minutes. If you feel how to rectimater the date, you can add more salt and / or pepper or even more sweet peppermint. Be sure to mix everything up really well.
If you think lentils still have a lot of motif for your taste, you can let them cook out for a few more minutes. That's all. The lentils with vegetables are ready to serve.

lima-beans-with-red-wine-vinaigrette.name: Lima Beans With Red Wine Vinaigrette

ingredients.prep: cut into large wedges with some root end attached

instructions: Place beans in a large pot. Pour in water to cover by 4". Let soak overnight at room temperature.

Drain beans; rinse and return to pot. Pour in water to cover beans by 2". Add celery, carrot, and onion. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low; simmer gently until beans are tender, about 1 hour (keep at a gentle simmer or beans will get mushy and split). Discard vegetables; drain beans. Let cool.
Whisk oil and vinegar in a small bowl; season with salt and pepper. DO AHEAD: Beans and vinaigrette can be made 2 hours ahead. Let stand at room temperature.
Transfer beans to a large bowl. Add herbs and drizzle with vinaigrette; toss to coat. Season to taste with salt and pepper.

littleneck-clams-with-new-potatoes-and-s.name: Littleneck Clams With New Potatoes And Spring Onions

ingredients.prep: whites halved and sliced; greens sliced on a diagonal, divided

instructions: Heat oil in a large heavy pot over medium heat. Add chorizo and cook, stirring often, until some fat has rendered and chorizo begins to crisp, about 4 minutes.

Add potatoes, spring onion whites, and garlic. Cook, tossing often, until potatoes are crisp-tender, 10-12 minutes. Add wine and cook until reduced by half, about 5 minutes. Add 2 1/2 cups water and continue to cook until potatoes are just tender, 5-8 minutes longer.
Add clams and half of onion greens, cover pot, and cook, stirring occasionally, until clams have opened, 8-10 minutes (discard any clams that do not open).
Divide clam mixture among bowls. Top with remaining onion greens and serve with toast.

lobster-roll-a-seafood-that-you-have-to-.name: Lobster Roll, A Seafood That You Have To Prepare
lobster-roll-a-seafood-that-you-have-to-.original_name: Lobster roll, un clásico de mar que tienes que preparar
instructions: We started our preparations by cooking the locusts. Fill a big pot with water and add salt. The recommended share is about two tablespoons of salt for every liter of water.
When water's boiling, sink the locusts face down and cook them for 10 minutes for every kilogram of weight. For instance, for locusts of 500 gr, the total time would be 5 minutes each.

Remove locusts from boiling water and put them right into cold water. That will maintain the tender texture of the flesh. Once cold, remove meat from his legs and tail and clamps. It crumbles the meat into small pieces and puts into a frying pan for 1 minute with melted butter and salt to taste. The last step is optional.
In a bowl mix lobster meat with mayonnaise, lemon juice, celery, salt and pepper into a bowl.
In another frying pan slightly tweets butter loaves.
Rellena cada pan con la mezcla de langosta y decora con hojas de lechuga. Sirve de inmediato.

love-apples-teleculinaria.name: Love Apples
instructions: Wash and dry the apples and put them in the cold.
Light a pot with water, sugar and agar-agar, always stirring until boiling and agar-agar becomes very dissolved. Then remove, add the dye and stir well.
Place a wooden stick on each apple and water them several times with the hot sauce. Let it dry and serve.

lutefisk.name: Lutefisk
instructions: Bring water and salt to a rolling boil. Add lutefisk; return to a boil. Remove from the heat, cover, and let sit for 8 minutes. An instant-read thermometer inserted into center should read at least 60°C (60 degrees C).
Carefully remove lutefisk from water using a scoop strainer or skimmer spoon. Cover lutefisk with melted butter and serve immediately.
